content: DynamoDB quota metering: UpdateItem with ADD (atomic counter) for usage ticks; ConditionExpression alongside ADD enforces caps in one round-trip (e.g. ADD seconds_used :tick with condition seconds_used < :cap — condition failure means quota exhausted). Concurrency limits: conditional write on an active_sessions counter (increment if < max_concurrent, decrement on session end; add TTL/sweeper for leaked markers on task death). Per-day keys: PK user_id, SK yyyy-mm-dd (or composite), enables per-day caps naturally; site-wide kill-switch = same pattern on a singleton GLOBAL item. Low volume here, hot-partition concerns don't apply.
